title: PushSubscriptionCreateInput doc comment references §3.1 which does not exist in spec
description: The doc comment on PushSubscriptionCreateInput references 'draft-atwood-jmap-chat-push-00 §3.1'. The actual spec section numbers are: §3 = PushSubscription Extension (which covers what used to be called §3.1 in draft form). The spec has no §3.1 sub-section heading. The doc on push_subscription_set in misc.rs has the same reference. A contributor looking up §3.1 in the spec will find nothing. Fix: correct to §3 (PushSubscription Extension).
